overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit covered pedestrian corridor in Night City. The player moves past holographic advertisements and palm trees, approaching an NCART metro station entrance where a transit map UI appears.

camera turns right to align with corridor direction

large concrete planter with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a large red billboard reading 'ZEIG DICH' before turning into a covered pedestrian walkway. The camera moves past glass building facades and enters a corridor marked by cyan neon frames and palm tree planters. A pedestrian in white walks ahead as the space transitions from semi-open to enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian corridor with digital billboards and surveillance warnings

events.description: passing under overhead warning signs indicating surveillance
slight adjustment to path while navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor passing digital billboards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: seated person on bench looking at device
pedestrian in red pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: illuminated signs reading WARNING ALL ACTIVITIES ARE RECORDED
large digital advertisement screens displaying various products
entrance to Night City Area Rapid Transit station visible in distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed neon-lit corridor with highly reflective floors. Overhead warning signs indicate surveillance recording. The walls feature large holographic billboards and advertisements. Several pedestrians are visible, including someone seated on a bench and another walking toward the camera. The NCART station entrance becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART metro station entrance with transit terminal

events.description: arriving at the NCART station entrance with glowing signage
game UI menu opens showing NCART transit map and destination options

agents.ego_description: approaching the NCART entrance and stopping to interact with the transit terminal

entered.detail: glass entrance doors with NCART branding and green neon lighting
large illuminated NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit sign

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the corridor where the NCART metro station entrance dominates the view. The entrance features prominent neon signage reading 'NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit' with glass doors and green neon accents. The camera stops at the entrance where a game UI menu appears, displaying the transit map with various destination options.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a semi-open urban plaza into a highly stylized, enclosed neon corridor that terminates at a transit hub. It begins by passing a large red billboard reading ZEIG DICH before turning into a pedestrian walkway lined with glass facades and cyan neon frames. As the camera moves deeper into the space, the environment shifts into a fully enclosed corridor with highly reflective floors, surveillance warnings, and towering holographic advertisements. The scene then opens up toward the end of the passage, where the glowing green and white signage of the NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit station dominates the view. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the station entrance as a digital transit map UI overlays the screen to display various destination options.
